section.heading: Evaluations

content.p: The Secretary shall, directly or through grants or contracts, evaluate the services provided and activities carried out with payments to States under this part.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XXV, formerly title XV, § 2511, as added Pub. L. 100–607, title II, § 221, Nov. 4, 1988, 102 Stat. 3101; renumbered title XXV, Pub. L. 101–93, § 5(e)(1), Aug. 16, 1989, 103 Stat. 612.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 2511 of act July 1, 1944, was successively renumbered by subsequent acts, see section 238j of this title.
